title: Splash Screen
description: Set up a splash screen image and background color for the application startup.
problemStatement:
Professional start! In your configuration, set up a `splash` object with an `image` path of `./assets/splash.png` and a `backgroundColor` of `"#ffffff"`.

**Requirement:** Nest the 'splash' object inside 'expo'.
hints: Slash screens hide the app loading time and keep the UI professional.
expectedOutput: Splash screen configuration added to project settings
